mapper.select: SELECT * FROM practice_session_question WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY question_order ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO practice_session_question ( session_id, question_id, question_order, question_type, stem, tags_json, options_json, standard_answer_json, analysis, user_answer_json, user_answer_label, answer_label, submitted, correct, version ) VALUES
( #{item.sessionId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.questionOrder}, #{item.questionType}, #{item.stem}, #{item.tagsJson}, #{item.optionsJson}, #{item.standardAnswerJson}, #{item.analysis}, #{item.userAnswerJson}, #{item.userAnswerLabel}, #{item.answerLabel}, #{item.submitted}, #{item.correct}, #{item.version} )
